Save Your Spot — It's Free
What You'll Learn

Sessions Built for Educators

Dive into 50+ sessions spanning financial literacy fundamentals, classroom tech, equity in fin ed, and more.

Financial Literacy
Credit, Debit & Beyond

Help students master the fundamentals of credit building, debit management, and responsible card use in the modern world.

Workshop
Teaching Taxes Without Tears

A practical classroom guide to making tax education accessible, memorable, and actually fun for K–12 and higher ed students.

Pedagogy
Money & Mental Wellness

Explore the intersection of financial stress and student wellbeing — and how empowering money skills builds lifelong confidence.

Keynote
Money Skills for Life

The opening keynote explores how financial education done right creates equity of opportunity — not just financial literacy.

Workshop
The Art of Saving Early

Research-backed frameworks for teaching students at every age how saving habits compound into life-changing outcomes.

2025 Lineup

Meet the Speakers

Hear from the educators, researchers, and fintech leaders shaping the future of financial literacy instruction.

Built for Educators.

World-Class Professional Development
